clues.clue: Small part detached, dropping very loudly
Half said dumpy children invented hairy giant
Fifty soldiers occupying small island, threat to constitution?
Electronic component shortened range that gun penetrates
Intriguing representation of Acropolis in art
Plenty without power welcoming current mildness
Settlement agreement banks scrap
Due to bra bust not easily moved
Like binary code, cheap in LA
Computer came up with specialised Eastern stuffing that family eats?
Chap heard something of particular interest, delivering kit
Mining area on hard ground loaded with diamonds
Lasted longer than external broadcast lacking animation?
Clue one answers today?
Random throw of the dice upset minister
Minute dash is added into pigment for tanner
Anybody taking drugs at rave?
Put down boiling pot where icy rings persist
Series of voyages found wrecks in prime locations
Shaded plants Thrower treated with dung
Traditional brewer still brought over bottles for each boy
List contents of shed then sell
Much-loved animal with book, into trespass somewhat?
Hot Aga nearly everybody attending stands round
Stone mistakenly topped with iron
Awful place to get RSI, said writer daily
British usurer that goes round making cuts
Hunter recalled room full of sleeping children at home
1000 live round boxes?
Section of roof tiled again and again

competition.prizeinfo: A £20 Waterstones voucher will be awarded for the first five randomly selected correct solutions. To enter, complete the crossword and submit your entry. 18+ only. Closing date is midnight on the first Wednesday after publication. Full T&Cs apply. Printed entries can be sent to: The Times Crossword xxxxx, PO Box 2164, Colchester, Essex CO2 8LJ.
